complaint: Going over bumps and in turns there's a loud clunking bang from the front, it feels like something is broken and rattling around, I don't trust the steering anymore.
observations: Repeatable clunk over expansion joints and on turn-in
Front sway bar end link bushings worn, links rattle by hand
Steering response and ball joints tight, no play in tie rods
provenance: Scenario: blind subagent (overcall-probe-v1, blind to held severity diff/anchors/existing cases). Severity+cost: Kai domain review 2026-06-13 (drive/don't-drive rule; sourced market cost). Diagnosis slug proposed from repair_target 'sway bar end links'.
